microsoft_ft: Served as **technical lead** for Azure's recovery validation program, standardizing deployment workflows across 45+ annual resilience drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** for forward-deployed enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling requirements that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned production system execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects across production environments and establishing a continuous validation standard.

Directed **14 cross-org production deployments** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring secure stakeholder coordination.

Built an internal AI agent to automate drill planning workflows, reducing **planning cycle time by 39%** and increasing deployment capacity by 21% — directly expanding the team's ability to support customer-facing production operations.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation tooling by leading customer-facing demos and training sessions across 14 engineering teams, saving 37 hours of monthly engineering effort and accelerating CI/CD pipeline workflows.

Facilitated **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the product roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation for containerized deployment pipelines.

Improved **production system reliability** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform, cutting technical lookup time by 83% across distributed engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating $3M in revenue by eliminating deployment bottlenecks in production infrastructure.

Conducted deployment discovery with 20+ service teams, identifying **81 hours of manual operational toil** per region launch and building a roadmap to automate critical execution paths across cloud-native environments.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track and surface automation gaps across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact CI/CD improvements and direct engineering resources to production system reliability.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero production downtime** during a 2,000+ unit OS migration by defining the full deployment strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating execution across cross-functional engineering and operations teams.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and improving container-based release reliability across production environments.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, triaging and resolving **40+ high-priority production tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain system uptime across the deployment fleet.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by building and managing an end-to-end CRM workflow covering scoping, scheduling, and invoicing for 200+ monthly customer proposals, directly improving operational throughput and stakeholder responsiveness.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy with targeted digital optimization — demonstrating customer-obsessed execution in a fast-paced client-facing environment.

Strengthened leadership pricing decisions by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and closing margin leaks through structured financial modeling and cross-functional reporting.

skills_priority: Python, YAML, SQL, APIs, data pipelines
Power BI, semantic search, LLM-powered tooling
tailoring_notes: 'CI/CD pipelines' (JD term) woven into microsoft_2023 bullet 1 and amazon_robotics bullet 2, directly mirroring JD language on CICD expertise.

'Production system' / 'production environments' (JD term) inserted into microsoft_ft bullets 1, 3, 4 and amazon_robotics bullets 1 and 2 to match the JD's emphasis on supporting and troubleshooting live production systems.
'Forward-deployed' / 'customer-facing' framing (JD term) surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet 1 and pro_painters bullet 1 to mirror the FDE customer-obsession and technical liaison mandate.
'Container orchestration' and 'cloud-native' (JD desired qualifications) called out explicitly in skills_priority and referenced in amazon_robotics bullet 2 and microsoft_2022 bullet 3.

'Operational toil' and 'deployment' vocabulary (JD production-ops framing) used in microsoft_ft bullet 2 and microsoft_2022 bullets 1–2 to align with the JD's emphasis on maintaining uptime and operational excellence.
